case_title: STAR REPORTING SERVICE, INC. VS. LAW OFFICES OF WAUKEEN MCCOY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STAR REPORTING SERVICE, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LAW OFFICES OF WAUKEEN MCCOY SEE ORDER IN COMPANION CASE NO CSM-13-843859 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-09-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM GEOFFREY HOWARD. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY EASTELLER BRUIHL--OWNER. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY WAUKEEN MCCOY--SELF. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GEOFFREY HOWARD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
